chunks.text: IRIS News | Page 10 | Instructional & Research Information Systems Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar From 6AM to 10AM on Wednesday, January 10th, facilities will be performing electrical work in Sutardja Dai Hall

be performing electrical work in Sutardja Dai Hall which will affect power to our network equipment. We expect that as a result, there will be two 5-10 minute network outages throughout SDH, one each at the beginning and end of the electrical work.

at the beginning and end of the electrical work. During these two periods, please expect all wired and wireless networks to be unavailable while our equipment reboots. We expect full network service to resume after each of these periods, however if

to resume after each of these periods, however if we experience an unexpected prolonged outage we will update this post with more information. Update 1/10 12:30PM: All SDH networks are online and stable after a couple brief interruptions earlier this

le after a couple brief interruptions earlier this morning. Please contact us at help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you continue to experience any network-related issues. Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, January 9th, 2024. Variou

day, January 10th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from 10pm to 10:30pm (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). [Read more…] about January IRIS Server Patching The Department’s mailing list server lists.eecs

ng The Department’s mailing list server lists.eecs.berkeley.edu will be offline for maintenance beginning at 6pm on Wednesday, January 3 2024. The server should be back up no later than 6:30pm. During this time the web interface will not be accessib

g this time the web interface will not be accessible, and mail to mailing lists will be delayed. This maintenance is to prepare for the January 4th power outage. [Read more…] about Mailing List maintenance, Wed 6-6:30pm Between 11AM and 5PM on Tuesd

enance, Wed 6-6:30pm Between 11AM and 5PM on Tuesday, December 26th, we will be performing maintenance on one of the EECS core routers in Soda Hall in preparation for various other projects occurring in 2024. We expect that this maintenance should no

in 2024. We expect that this maintenance should not affect any network traffic; however there is the possibility of a brief (~5 minute) outage to some networks in the event of an unforeseen circumstance. Update 12/26 14:46: This maintenance has been

ce. Update 12/26 14:46: This maintenance has been completed without any impact to network service. Please contact us at help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you are experiencing any network issues. Between 12PM and 4PM on Wednesday, December 27th, we will be re

and 4PM on Wednesday, December 27th, we will be replacing the access switches which provide wired and wireless network connectivity on the 4th through 7th floors of Soda Hall. During this time, wired and wireless networks on the 4th through 7th floor

and wireless networks on the 4th through 7th floors will experience various interruptions. Note that the Sky Computing Lab will not be affected, as the switch serving that area was already upgraded during a previous maintenance. Update 12/27 13:24: T

ring a previous maintenance. Update 12/27 13:24: This work has been completed and all networks are back online. Please contact us at help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you notice any connectivity issues. Tonight (night of Dec.14 / morning of Dec.15) at 2AM w

ht (night of Dec.14 / morning of Dec.15) at 2AM we will be performing a software upgrade on one of the switches providing wired and wireless connectivity on the third floor of Soda Hall. There will be a brief (approximately 5 minute) interruption to

e a brief (approximately 5 minute) interruption to networks in the following areas: – Wired networks in rooms 310-329, 331-333, 364A, and 373-398 – Wireless networks in rooms 373-395 and immediately surrounding areas The following areas will not be a

urrounding areas The following areas will not be affected: – Wired networks in rooms 300-306A, 330, 340-349, 367-369 – Wireless networks in rooms 302-349 and immediately surrounding areas Update: This work was completed on schedule and without any un

work was completed on schedule and without any unexpected impact, but we neglected to update this post in a timely manner. Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, December 12th, 2023. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers wil

ecs will be patched and rebooted Tuesday night. DNS servers cronus and rhea may also be briefly unavailable while rebooting at approximately 8:00pm Tuesday. On Wednesday, December 13th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from 10pm

al DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from 10pm to 10:30pm (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). [Read more…] about December IRIS Server Patching Due to the Winter Holiday, Energy Curtailment, and New Year’s Holidays, the Ber

ergy Curtailment, and New Year’s Holidays, the Berkeley campus is officially closed for the period Monday, December 25 to Tuesday, January 2, reopening on Wednesday, January 3, 2024. All departmental computing servers will remain on and should be ava

computing servers will remain on and should be available during the break, but there will be no staff on site to provide any computing support or handle any requests. Automatic monitoring systems will alert staff to critical infrastructure problems,

alert staff to critical infrastructure problems, and any such problems will be dealt with on a best-effort basis. The IRIS Helpdesk office will be closed Wednesday, December 20 through Friday, January 5, re-opening on January 8. Helpdesk staff will

y 5, re-opening on January 8. Helpdesk staff will be operating remotely December 20-23, and January 3-5. If you need on-site assistance between December 20-23 or January 3-5, please email help@eecs, and we may be able to schedule an appointment with

nd we may be able to schedule an appointment with you. Problem reports can be left on the Helpdesk voice mail (510-642-7777) or emailed to help@eecs during the campus closure period, but staff may not receive or reply to these messages until January

receive or reply to these messages until January 3. Requests for new IRIS accounts that are received after 5pm December 15 may not be processed until January 3, 2024. Requests for network support that are received after 5pm December 20 may not be pr

t are received after 5pm December 20 may not be processed until January 3, 2024. During the break, Instructional labs will be locked, but the main servers will remain online (for details, see the Instructional website ). Instructional support staff w

ructional website ). Instructional support staff will occasionally monitor inst@eecs email over the break. Please be aware, though, that staff may not be able to respond or reply to messages until January 3. Computing support staff will be monitoring

uary 3. Computing support staff will be monitoring their email when possible, so please use standard email addresses to report any urgent problems. As a reminder: Instructional Computing Environment: inst@eecs Research / Staff Computing Environment:

inst@eecs Research / Staff Computing Environment: help@eecs Information regarding campus IT closures is available here: https://technology.berkeley.edu/news/reduced-it-support-fall-winter-holidays Happy Holidays! To accommodate the installation of

appy Holidays! To accommodate the installation of new circuit breakers and PDU (Power Distribution Unit) connections, all electrical power to the 2nd and 4th floors of Soda Hall will be shutdown during the day of Thursday, January 4, 2024. Critical s

g the day of Thursday, January 4, 2024. Critical systems will be down from 6am until perhaps 5pm. Of primary note is that the department NetApp fileservers will be down, so any systems that depend on HOME or PROJECT storage will be shutdown or nonfun

HOME or PROJECT storage will be shutdown or nonfunctional. Services that will be unavailable during the maintenance period include: department webservice (including people.eecs, www2.eecs and all other IRIS-hosted web sites), IRIS account & network f

r IRIS-hosted web sites), IRIS account & network forms, login servers (login.eecs, login-mfa.eecs, winterm.eecs), print server print.eecs, and outgoing SMTP server gateway.eecs. [Read more…] about Soda Hall Power Outage on January 4, 2024 Microsoft w
